ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the product image */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date and time the product was published */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the product is listed */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the product listing */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the product listing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product listing was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product listing was last updated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Current discount on the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit for inventory management */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the store */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., store manager, marketing specialist, admin) */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the user is associated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user viewing the product */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date and time the product was viewed */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view (e.g., page view, click) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the view (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user viewing the product */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the campaign */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store associated with the campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign was last updated */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, paused, completed) */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the campaign */,
  "campaign_channels" TEXT /* Channels used for the campaign (e.g., email, social media) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., views, clicks, conversions) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time the metric was recorded */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for the campaign */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the campaign */,
  "roi" REAL /* Return on Investment for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product to trigger a reorder */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last reorder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)
